channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-16 04:34 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The planet Saturn, captured during it's closest approach to Earth from the top of a parking garage i...
item.description: The planet Saturn, captured during it's closest approach to Earth from the top of a parking garage in the heart of Los Angeles. You can do plenty of astrophotography from a big city!

item.title: @elonmusk: Fired USAID Employee In Charge of Making Countries Gay Speaks Out
item.description: Fired USAID Employee In Charge of Making Countries Gay Speaks Out

item.title: @elonmusk: The Age of the Last Menpodcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…
item.description: The Age of the Last Menpodcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…

item.title: @elonmusk: A Restore Britain Government would defund the BBC.
item.description: A Restore Britain Government would defund the BBC.

item.title: @elonmusk: We received the letter of condolence from H. E.@CyrilRamaphosafollowing the martyrdom of Imam Khamen...
item.description: We received the letter of condolence from H. E.@CyrilRamaphosafollowing the martyrdom of Imam Khamenei. Iran and South Africa have deep-rooted friendship.

item.title: @elonmusk: The computational power in your iPhone’s CHARGER is more than what was used to land on the moon.
item.description: The computational power in your iPhone’s CHARGER is more than what was used to land on the moon.

item.title: @elonmusk: Britain's sad legal reality is that people who complain and protest about migrant crimes often get p...
item.description: Britain's sad legal reality is that people who complain and protest about migrant crimes often get punished more severely than the criminals themselves

item.title: @elonmusk: Being ranked #1 doesn’t mean we’re good enough. It only means we're more *reasonable* than others. T...
item.description: Being ranked #1 doesn’t mean we’re good enough. It only means we're more *reasonable* than others. There’s still a lot of work to do. If we’re not solving users’ problems, then we’re not good enough. If you have any feedbacks on Video Editing, feel free to leave it in the comments. Thank you!

item.title: @elonmusk: America does not have “magic ground” that fundamentally changes who people are when they arrive here...
item.description: America does not have “magic ground” that fundamentally changes who people are when they arrive here. If we filter for high work ethic, talent & trustworthiness, we will get that. If we don’t, we will inherit all the problems of the countries those people are leaving. The end.

item.title: @elonmusk: There is no substitute for the person who Knows What To Do.
item.description: There is no substitute for the person who Knows What To Do.
